category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a JVM-based framework for modular microservices; official Micronaut homepage calls it a JVM-based full-stack framework for microservice and serverless applications.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use the capitalized name Micronaut; source_facts.name is micronaut.
docs_sources: Official Micronaut homepage links to docs.micronaut.io for user documentation and guides.micronaut.io for step-by-step guides.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/micronaut-projects/micronaut-starter; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable mn identify the Micronaut CLI/framework; official homepage describes JVM, microservice, serverless, cloud-native, Java/Groovy/Kotlin support.
